title: Milano Cortina 2026 Olympic Winter Games
summary: Competed in both Normal Hill and Large Hill events at the Milano Cortina Olympics.

title: Season Finale at Planica — 7th in Flying Hill
summary: Wrapped up the 2025/26 World Cup season with 7th place in the Flying Hill HS240 at Planica.

title: Team Silver at Planica
summary: Japan earned 2nd place in the Team Flying Hill HS240 at Planica, Slovenia.

title: Podium! 3rd Place at Oslo
summary: Claimed a podium spot with 3rd place at the World Cup Large Hill HS134 in Oslo, Norway.

title: 2nd Place at World Cup Sapporo
summary: Earned silver at the World Cup Large Hill HS137 in Sapporo, Japan.

title: Team Gold at Ski-Flying World Championships
summary: Won team gold at the FIS Ski-Flying World Championships in Oberstdorf, Germany.

title: 2nd Place at Grand Prix Rasnov
summary: Secured silver at the Grand Prix Normal Hill HS97 in Rasnov, Romania.
